font-family.$description: Deepest heading level becomes an instrument label — mono, the 'this is data' register.

font-weight.$description: Space Mono needs no added weight at label sizes.

spacing-after.$description: Minor heads sit on their copy.

line-height.$description: Line height for H6 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

measure.$description: Maximum width for H6 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for H6 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
